_publications._publicationTitle: Restoring functional neurofibromin by protein transduction.

_contextSnippet: we measured the amount of phosphorylated ERK1/2 in NF1 patient fibroblasts (NF244 and NF191, representing a good and a bad responder) before and after synNF1 transduction
details: Successfully detected ERK1/2 levels in western blot analysis of NF1 patient fibroblasts and control cells
